put.description: This is an example operation to edit product.

categories.description: Array of product category ID url. Eg. ["119", "135"]

override_loyalty.description: Override loyalty point for this product

prepend_description_id.description: Prepend product description with content block. If you want to remove a value, please enter a blank value.

append_description_id.description: Append product description with content block. If you want to remove a value, please enter a blank value.

application/json.example:
{
    "status": 1,
    "data": {
